summary: The importer adds a markdown branch without a paired test. A maintainer should confirm expected behavior before merge.

findings.title: Markdown importer branch lacks a paired test
findings.scenario: A markdown payload without title should be parsed deterministically, but no test covers this new branch.
findings.recommendation: Add a focused importer test for markdown payloads with and without title.

suppressed_low_confidence.title: Importer shape may need a shared parser
suppressed_low_confidence.suppression_reason: The diff alone does not prove duplication or boundary breakage.
